content:
🌟 allure-notifications | Java
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating the distribution of test execution reports to communication platforms.
✨ Key Features: • Automatic test result notifications • Support for multiple messengers (Telegram, Slack, Mattermost, Discord, etc.) • Generates a pie chart visualization of test statistics • Includes a link to the Allure report/build • Configurable via JSON file
📖 Summary: Allure Notifications is a Java library that automatically sends test execution results to various messengers. It generates a pie chart from the test statistics and includes a link to the build report.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
